String.name: SapConsoleProductDescription
String.En: SAP Console is a framework in which several components work together enabling users to access and execute R/3 from character based device or web enabled handled device. SAP Console supports character-cell terminals, including radio frequency (RF) devices, and web-equipped devices. The main components involved are "SAP Console" and "SAP Console Administrator".
String.De: SAP Console is a framework in which several components work together enabling users to access and execute R/3 from character based device or web enabled handled device. SAP Console supports character-cell terminals, including radio frequency (RF) devices, and web-equipped devices. The main components involved are "SAP Console" and "SAP Console Administrator".

String.name: SapConsoleDestDirPrompt
String.En: Choose the path to the SAP Console installation directory
String.De: Wählen Sie das SAP Console Zielverzeichnis aus
